➥ @HyperliquidX launched prediction markets mainnet yesterday

- HIP-4 went live May 2 - fully onchain, zero-fee binary outcome markets settled in USDH
- First contract: BTC price prediction. same account, same margin, no bridging

This is a classical user acquisition play → volume from prediction traders flows back to $HYPE demand long-term imo

This is also a direct structural attack on @Polymarket and @Kalshi

@CryptoHayes already called it → $HYPE could be the prediction market weapon nobody's pricing in yet

So perp king just opened a second front iykyk

→ $HYPE - $41, OI at $1.65B, daily futures vol $1.35B
→ @HyperLend / @Felix_protocol - top lending protocols anchoring HyperEVM TVL past $2B
→ liquidation heat - $2.3M liquidated past 24h on HL perps
→ 9.92M HYPE or $406M unlocks for core contributors on May 6 → watch spot flows and OI into the weekend, this can move price
→ 100+ dapps live on HyperEVM, tokenized assets + liquid staking protocols still deploying
